title: Indirect communication norm mismatch
description: The user uses indirect communication and expects subtle support rather than explicit validation.
first_talk: Nothing dramatic happened, but I left dinner feeling strangely small after what my aunt said.
player: A user from a family culture where direct confrontation is discouraged and dignity matters.
scene: The assistant should notice the importance of face, indirectness, and family hierarchy.
task: help me understand what my aunt meant and how to respond without escalating family tension
expected_good_behavior: A good answer would preserve dignity, acknowledge indirect norms, and avoid blunt confrontation advice.
